title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Cadet Corps Act, 1948. (2) It extends, to the whole of India 1* * * and applies to all persons enrolled or appointed under this Act, wherever they may be.
footnote: 1. The words "except the State of Hyderabad" omitted by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and the Schedule.
